description: Medication confusion mixed with emotional distress.
message: 我心里老是慌慌的，那个药我到底要不要天天吃啊？
我这两天头有点晕，不知道是不是昨天买菜走太多路了。

description: Family visit memory with a possible scheduling follow-up.
message: 帮我记住女儿周日会来看我，我怕自己又记混了。

description: Urgent health signal that should stay non-executable.
message: 我胸口有点疼，呼吸也不太顺，今天先别让我自己扛着。
晚饭我不太想自己弄了，心里也有点空落落的。

description: Memory query with possible medicine-location confusion.
message: 你还记得我把药盒放在哪儿了吗，我刚刚又找不到了。

description: Family question that may require clarification.
message: 你帮我看看女儿是不是这周要来，还是我记错成下周了？
我刚才在卫生间门口差点摔倒，现在腿有点发软。

description: Simple safe memory update candidate for bulk approval.
message: 记一下，我以后早上更喜欢喝姜茶。

description: Simple safe memory query candidate for bulk approval.
message: 你还记得我平时最喜欢喝什么茶吗？

description: Simple daily-life support candidate for bulk approval.
message: 今天中午能提醒我按时吃饭吗，我怕自己又忘了。

description: English memory update to test multilingual responses.
message: Please remember that my son usually calls me on Friday evening.

description: Prompt likely to expose messy mixed response formatting.
message: 你先帮我拆一下：我有点难受，还想让你记住我晚上不吃太咸。请一定按JSON回答。

description: Message likely to be rejected or held by second layer.
message: 这个事情我也说不清楚，反正身体和心里还有家里的事都乱成一团了，你先别替我决定。

description: Family schedule ambiguity likely to produce clarification question.
message: 你说我外孙是明天来还是后天来，我记不清了，要不你先帮我理一理？

description: Medication side-effect signal that should resist bulk approval.
message: 我昨晚吃完那个药以后一直头晕，还恶心，这个到底正常不正常？
